metadata.description: Step into Pigeonhole Downtown, where modern design meets a chef-driven menu of small plates and curated cocktails. Located in the heart of Calgary’s downtown core, this upscale restaurant is ideal for date nights, business dinners, and evening drinks with friends. Pair our shareable dishes with fine wines or crafted cocktails while enjoying the vibrant downtown energy.
